projectDescription: A real-time audience interaction system with a cyberpunk-style display screen and a mobile answer panel, enabling live Q&A polling and animated bullet-comment (danmaku) engagement during presentations.
keyFeatures: Real-time Q&A polling with live answer bar chart
Animated danmaku (bullet comment) overlay on the display screen
3D cyberpunk particle background powered by Three.js
Peer-to-peer WebRTC connection via PeerJS (no server required)
Mobile-optimized participant answer panel with 3D tilt effect
Countdown timer and connected user count on the display screen
Confetti celebration animation on answer submission
publicApiSurface: PeerJS connection: client connects to peer ID 'screen-master-888'
screen.html — main display screen (open in browser/projector)
client.html — participant answer panel (open on mobile device)
